mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_email_token (user_id, email, token_type, token, status, due_time) values ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tokenType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{dueTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: delete from kh_user_email_token where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and token_type = #{tokenType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}
